set.body: Round 3 reconciliation notes for retrospective. Refuted (execution disproved round-2 static inferences): amatrix-86l (Math group), amatrix-j5a (diag<-), amatrix-dev (host_cache_valid). Confirmed via execution: amatrix-jnd (kronecker), amatrix-fqh (cache keys), amatrix-8kj (double-drop), amatrix-aul (on.exit leaks <e2><80><94> scope widened). Inconclusive/unreachable from public API: amatrix-qm2, amatrix-cth, amatrix-dmy (H2 could not reproduce on in-bounds inputs; blocked by amatrix_release_resident not being exported). New durable artifacts: tools/lint-anti-patterns.R + baseline (runs in 0.09s, 544 hits across 10 patterns, exits 0 against current baseline), tests/fuzz/differential.R (26 ops, 53k fixtures/5min), tests/testthat/test-bughunt-method-sweep.R (110 methods on both classes and backends). Round 3 methodology lesson: execution-based hunters REFUTED 3 round-2 bugs and CONFIRMED 4 others <e2><80><94> the round-2 estimate of 10-20% static-inference false-positive rate was roughly accurate (3/17 <e2><89><88> 18%).
set.title: Bug-hunt-r3 reconciliation: cross-hunter refutations and confirmations
